title: Spartan Weaponry: Undergarden
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with The Undergarden.
body:
**
Adds new [Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden) themed weapons and traits to [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry).
**
### Supported materials: - **Cloggrum** - **Froststeel** - Chilly - Slows down foes for 30 seconds - **Utherium** - Rotspawn Damage Bonus - +50% damage against Rotspawn - **Forgotten** - Undergarden Damage Bonus - +50% damage against non-boss Undergarden mobs ###
Planned updates: - Support 1.19.2 - Support 1.18.2 - Fix any [bugs](https://github.com/KreloX/SpartanUndergarden/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Abug)
**
Get yourself a server with 15% off the first month at Kinetic Hosting with code KRELOX
** [![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://onedrive.live.com/embed?resid=6BF544900F9867AE%2113808&authkey=%21AJZMCAdCdWoTprs&width=900&height=194)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
